pages.text: It can be difficult to figure out an animal's health status by simply looking at it. This is why its recommended to use a Stethoscope on animals whom you may suspect have health issues. A Stethoscope can diagnose an animal's ailments and even provide immunity and trait data.

pages.title: Diagnosing
pages.text: You can diagnose an animal with a Stethoscope. Simply right-click it to get a full breakdown of the animal's general health.
